items.content_html: latex2anki is a Rust-based application engineered to automate the conversion of LaTeX documents into Anki flashcard decks. This project aims to streamline the learning process for students and professionals who utilize LaTeX for complex documentation, particularly in fields like mathematics, physics, engineering, and computer science.
items.title: Lurgrid/latex2anki: latex2anki is a Rust-based application engineered to automate the conversion of LaTeX documents into Anki flashcard decks. This project aims to streamline the learning process for students and professionals who utilize LaTeX for complex documentation, particularly in fields like mathematics, physics, engineering, and computer science.

items.content_html: PDF2Anki transforms PDF documents into Anki flashcards effortlessly. Utilizing the power of OpenAI's GPT models, PDF2Anki intelligently parses and divides PDF text into manageable sections, generating question-and-answer pairs for efficient learning.

items.content_html: This repository is a collection of my daily study habits showing the ANKI questions I answer daily. The subjects change daily ranging from syntactical expressions to array methods and the basics of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. This repository shows a history of the concepts I am training on and improving myself with everyday.
items.title: leannekeenan/ANKI: This repository is a collection of my daily study habits showing the  ANKI questions I answer daily. The subjects change daily ranging from syntactical expressions to array methods and the basics of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. This repository shows a history of the concepts I am training on and improving myself with everyday.
